meta.external_reference: bazaardb.gg (e.g. patch 13.3) may list more rows than this wiki export; this file is limited to public wiki Cargo + monster pages.

28_hour_fitness.name: 28 Hour Fitness
28_hour_fitness.desc: When you use a Weapon , your items with Shield gain + 10/20/30 Shield for the fight. When you use a Shield item, your Weapons gain + 10/20/30 Damage for the fight.

3d_printer.name: 3D Printer
3d_printer.desc: Transform into 3 Gold / Diamond copies of the small, non-legendary item to the left of this for the fight.

abacus.name: Abacus
abacus.desc: Shield equal to x1/x2 the value of the adjacent items.

admiral_s_badge.name: Admiral's Badge
